programme.title: I, Me Aur Main
programme.desc: Aarush, Al and Tanmay, three womanisers get the shock of their life when they find a baby girl at their doorstep claiming to be the daughter of one of them. As they try to find her mother, they discover an unexplored side of their own personality.

programme.title: Phir Hera Pheri
programme.desc: The lives of three men changes overnight when they lose all the money they invested in a scam. Now, they must find another way to repay the dreaded loan sharks or face their death.

programme.title: Super Star
programme.desc: Kunal Mehra, a junior artist, dreams of becoming the biggest Bollywood star. One day, an opportunity knocks when he is asked to replace his lookalike for a big production house only condition being that he cannot give away his identity.

programme.title: Bollywood Movie
programme.desc: The Movie Club provides Bollywood films, popular Indian movies, and general entertainment programming.
